잠언 10:1.content: The proverbs of Solomon. A wise son makes a glad father; but a foolish son brings grief to his mother.

잠언 10:2.content: Treasures of wickedness profit nothing, but righteousness delivers from death.

잠언 10:3.content: Yahweh will not allow the soul of the righteous to go hungry, but he thrusts away the desire of the wicked.

잠언 10:4.content: He becomes poor who works with a lazy hand, but the hand of the diligent brings wealth.

잠언 10:5.content: He who gathers in summer is a wise son, but he who sleeps during the harvest is a son who causes shame.

잠언 10:6.content: Blessings are on the head of the righteous, but violence covers the mouth of the wicked.

잠언 10:7.content: The memory of the righteous is blessed, but the name of the wicked will rot.

잠언 10:8.content: The wise in heart accept commandments, but a chattering fool will fall.

잠언 10:9.content: He who walks blamelessly walks surely, but he who perverts his ways will be found out.

잠언 10:10.content: One winking with the eye causes sorrow, but a chattering fool will fall.

잠언 10:11.content: The mouth of the righteous is a spring of life, but violence covers the mouth of the wicked.

잠언 10:12.content: Hatred stirs up strife, but love covers all wrongs.

잠언 10:13.content: Wisdom is found on the lips of him who has discernment, but a rod is for the back of him who is void of understanding.

잠언 10:14.content: Wise men lay up knowledge, but the mouth of the foolish is near ruin.

잠언 10:15.content: The rich man’s wealth is his strong city. The destruction of the poor is their poverty.

잠언 10:16.content: The labor of the righteous leads to life. The increase of the wicked leads to sin.

잠언 10:17.content: He is in the way of life who heeds correction, but he who forsakes reproof leads others astray.

잠언 10:18.content: He who hides hatred has lying lips. He who utters a slander is a fool.

잠언 10:19.content: In the multitude of words there is no lack of disobedience, but he who restrains his lips does wisely.

잠언 10:20.content: The tongue of the righteous is like choice silver. The heart of the wicked is of little worth.

잠언 10:21.content: The lips of the righteous feed many, but the foolish die for lack of understanding.

잠언 10:22.content: Yahweh’s blessing brings wealth, and he adds no trouble to it.

잠언 10:23.content: It is a fool’s pleasure to do wickedness, but wisdom is a man of understanding’s pleasure.

잠언 10:24.content: What the wicked fear, will overtake them, but the desire of the righteous will be granted.

잠언 10:25.content: When the whirlwind passes, the wicked is no more; but the righteous stand firm forever.

잠언 10:26.content: As vinegar to the teeth, and as smoke to the eyes, so is the sluggard to those who send him.

잠언 10:27.content: The fear of Yahweh prolongs days, but the years of the wicked shall be shortened.

잠언 10:28.content: The prospect of the righteous is joy, but the hope of the wicked will perish.

잠언 10:29.content: The way of Yahweh is a stronghold to the upright, but it is a destruction to the workers of iniquity.

잠언 10:30.content: The righteous will never be removed, but the wicked will not dwell in the land.

잠언 10:31.content: The mouth of the righteous produces wisdom, but the perverse tongue will be cut off.

잠언 10:32.content: The lips of the righteous know what is acceptable, but the mouth of the wicked is perverse.
